description: Style Note french connection, the edgy, attitudinal, high street British fashion brand sets out to create well-designed and fashion-forward bags with a quirky spin on design. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and organiser pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the fcuk handbags provides you with a superb array of ideas.  Product Details Handbag with a main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket inside One zippered pocket on the front One pocket on the front with a press button closure Two short handles to carry style and ease Material and Care Shell: 100% polyurethane and lining 100% polyester Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 30 cm Width: 38 cm Depth: 15 cm
